237.description: 0 - 3G 1 - GSM 2 - 4G 3 - LTE CAT M1 4 - LTE CAT NB1 99 - Unknown

238.description: MAC address of NMEA receiver device connected via Bluetooth

243.name: Green driving event duration
243.description: Duration of event that did generate Green driving

247.name: Crash detection
247.description: 1 – real crash detected (device is calibrated) 2 – limited crash trace (device not calibrated) 3 - limited crash trace (device is calibrated) 4 - full crash trace (device not calibrated) 5 - full cras

248.name: Immobilizer
248.description: 0 – iButton not connected 1 – iButton connected (Immobilizer) 2 – iButton connected (Authorized Driving)

250.name: Trip
250.description: 0 – trip stop 1 – trip start From 01.00.24 fw version available with BT app new values: 2 – Business Status 3 – Private Status 4-9 – Custom Statuses

253.name: Green driving type
253.description: 1 – harsh acceleration 2 – harsh braking 3 – harsh cornering

254.name: Green Driving Value
254.description: Depending on green driving type: if harsh acceleration or braking – g*100 (value 123 -> 1.23g). If Green driving source is „GPS“ – harsh cornering value is rad/s*100. If source is „Accelerometer“ – g*

255.name: Over Speeding
255.description: At over speeding start km/h, at over speeding end km/h

258.name: EcoMaximum
258.description: Element stores maximum accelerometer values in mg on all axis during Eco driving event 8 Bytes: 2B Zeros 2B - X axis 2B - Y axis 2B - Z axis

259.name: EcoAverage
259.description: Element stores average accelerometer values in mg on all axis during Eco driving event 8 Bytes: 2B Zeros 2B - X axis 2B - Y axis 2B - Z axis

260.name: EcoDuration
260.description: Duration of Eco driving event in miliseconds

263.name: BT Status
263.description: 0 - BT is disabled 1 - BT Enabled, not device connected 2 - Device connected, BTv3 Only 3 - Device connected, BLE only 4 - Device connected, BLE + BT

284.name: Driving Records
284.description: Number of Records between Ignition ON and Ignition OFF

285.name: Blood alcohol content
285.description: Alcohol content in blood in perlims and mode. First 14 bits from MSB are perlims multiplied by 1000 and last to bits are 0 - Passive test, 1 Active test, 2 and 3 are reserved.
